name: sql_instructions_asset_timeseries
description: SQL execution agent instructions/examples for producing and validating per-asset time series snapshots across SOC2/HIPAA/general features.

items.question: Show risk trend for a specific asset over the last 30 days (SOC2 + HIPAA).
items.instructions: Return SOC2 and HIPAA risk scores by day for a single asset to visualize trend and verify time series integrity.
items.sql:
SELECT s.snapshot_ts::date AS day,
       s.soc2_raw_risk, s.soc2_risk_level,
       h.hipaa_raw_risk, h.hipaa_risk_level
FROM public.soc2_asset_risk_timeseries s
LEFT JOIN public.hipaa_asset_risk_timeseries h
  ON h.nuid = s.nuid AND h.dev_id = s.dev_id AND h.snapshot_ts::date = s.snapshot_ts::date
WHERE s.nuid = :nuid AND s.dev_id = :dev_id
  AND s.snapshot_ts >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
ORDER BY day;
items.context: Time series validation for cross-framework scoring on the same asset.

items.question: How many assets became stale today (by freshness bucket)?
items.instructions: Provide a daily operational view of monitoring freshness movement. Use this for alerting thresholds later.
items.sql:
SELECT snapshot_ts::date AS day, asset_freshness_bucket, COUNT(*) AS assets
FROM public.asset_feature_timeseries
WHERE snapshot_ts::date = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 1,2;
